acceptance_targets: [craft_001_moral_gloss_repetition] Pass if at least one of the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:99, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:243 lands without an explicit self-condemning tag and Daro's hunger/manipulation remain unmistakable from what he does and what the room does back. Fail if each cited beat still ends by telling the reader he knows he is wrong.

[dialogue_001_abstract_doctrine_register] Pass if the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:337 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:339 argue the same point without abstract institutional terms like 'structural' or 'operative', and the two voices still read distinctly as Lale and Daro. Fail if the exchange still hinges on essayistic jargon.

[prose_001_beat_label_formula] Pass if none of the revised pivots at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:323, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:349, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:397 uses 'There it was' or an equivalent abstract beat label, and each turn is readable through concrete change on the page. Fail if the pivots are still announced instead of enacted.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if at least one of the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:99, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:243 lands without an explicit self-condemning tag and Daro's hunger/manipulation remain unmistakable from what he does and what the room does back. Fail if each cited beat still ends by telling the reader he knows he is wrong.
findings.problem: Daro's POV repeatedly appends self-indicting gloss right after his manipulative turns, which starts to cushion the ugliness of the demagoguery instead of letting appetite and consequence stay exposed on the page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the after-beat commentary at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:99, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:243. Keep at most one strongest moment of self-recognition, and convert the others into immediate bodily or social consequence: crowd response, Riva/Nami's visible reaction, Daro's breath/throat/body, or the altered room. Let the manipulation incriminate him through action rather than repeated 'he knew/he hated it' explanation.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:337 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:339 argue the same point without abstract institutional terms like 'structural' or 'operative', and the two voices still read distinctly as Lale and Daro. Fail if the exchange still hinges on essayistic jargon.
findings.problem: The Lale/Daro exchange slips into abstract doctrine jargon ('structural' and 'operative') at the exact moment the chapter needs bodily, local, pressure-shaped speech. It reads more like thematic paraphrase than these siblings arguing inside flood panic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:337 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:339 in the novel's lived material vocabulary: route, load, cut, lie, carry, mouth, boat, work. Preserve Lale's precision and Daro's persuasive opportunism, but make the clash sound spoken in this world rather than theorized from above it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if none of the revised pivots at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:323, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:349, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:397 uses 'There it was' or an equivalent abstract beat label, and each turn is readable through concrete change on the page. Fail if the pivots are still announced instead of enacted.
findings.problem: The narration repeats the exact beat-label formula 'There it was' at three major pivots. That signposting announces turns the scene has already dramatized and flattens the prose at key reversals.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the pivot sentences at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:323, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:349, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:397. Replace each abstract turn-label with a fresh, POV-specific manifestation of the shift in bodies, objects, sound, or crowd movement so the reversal arrives through scene pressure rather than narrator summary.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
